project_type: Java CDK infrastructure-as-code project for a sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: Maven 3.9.10 with pom.xml. Maven Central requires proxy config in ~/.m2/settings.xml (already configured). The surefire plugin clears NODE_OPTIONS to prevent Jsii crashes.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack pattern). Tests live in src/test/java/com/myorg/. The assertions library is bundled in aws-cdk-lib (no separate dependency needed).
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' to execute all CDK assertion tests. 2. Run 'cdk synth' (with NODE_OPTIONS unset) to verify CloudFormation template synthesizes. 3. Verify ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram reflects implemented resources.
setup_instructions: 1. mise use java@17 (mise.toml already configured). 2. Maven proxy in ~/.m2/settings.xml is pre-configured. 3. npm install -g aws-cdk for CLI (already installed). 4. unset NODE_OPTIONS before running cdk commands.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - Maven Central accessible via proxy. Node.js available for CDK CLI. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset for cdk synth. The surefire plugin config handles this for mvn test. Java version must be 17 (mise.toml configured).
contribution_requirements: 1. Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement minimal code to pass. 2. Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, etc.). 3. ARCHITECTURE.md must stay in sync with implemented constructs. 4. Use L2 constructs. 5. Least-privilege IAM and encryption best practices.
key_patterns: CdkBaseStack is the main stack. CdkBaseApp is the entry point. Tests use Template.fromStack(stack) then template.hasResourceProperties() for assertions. Package is com.myorg. CDK version range [2.255.0,3.0.0).
directory_structure: src/main/java/com/myorg/ - CDK app and stack definitions. src/test/java/com/myorg/ - JUnit 5 CDK assertion tests. Root has ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, pom.xml, cdk.json.
